response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON lyrics were null, so 100% manual transcription and translation were carried out.
2. JSON Usage: The JSON description was used for general segment guidelines, while transcription and translation were handled entirely manually from native audio observation.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal cues to prevent delays, with smooth transition timings for fast-paced lyrics and rapid-fire Indonesian/Japanese banter in the talk segment. No descriptive closed-captions are included.

subtitles.original: Iblis dari mana kamu?
subtitles.english: What kind of demon are you?

subtitles.original: Eh, iblis dari mana kamu? Waah, gatelnya orang iblis.
subtitles.english: Eh, what kind of demon are you? Whoa, this demon is so cheeky.

subtitles.original: Wahai!
subtitles.english: Hey!

subtitles.original: Itu empat tanduk, bahaya sekali!
subtitles.english: Those four horns, they look super dangerous!

subtitles.original: Iya, jadi gini...
subtitles.english: Yeah, so it's like this...

subtitles.original: Aku datang jauh-jauh...
subtitles.english: I came all this way...

subtitles.original: Ya, jauh-jauh...
subtitles.english: Yes, all this way...

subtitles.original: Meskipun tidak diundang!
subtitles.english: Even though I wasn't invited!

subtitles.original: Oh, diundang!
subtitles.english: Oh, you were invited!

subtitles.original: Iya, kayaknya kamu mengundang yang lain deh tadi.
subtitles.english: Yeah, but I think you invited others earlier.

subtitles.original: Maksudnya... どういう意味？
subtitles.english: You mean... What do you mean?

subtitles.original: Kenapa tiba-tiba 日本語？
subtitles.english: Why the sudden Japanese?

subtitles.original: Kamu malaikat Jepang ya?
subtitles.english: Are you a Japanese angel?

subtitles.original: Bisa berhenti muter nggak? Pusing.
subtitles.english: Can you stop spinning? I'm getting dizzy.

subtitles.original: Pusing? Ya udah. Malaikat kok pusing, guys.
subtitles.english: Dizzy? Fine. An angel getting dizzy, guys.

subtitles.original: Iya, aku di sini soalnya datang buat ngerayu kamu aja sebenarnya, pengen main bareng.
subtitles.english: Actually, I came here just to tease you. I want to play together.

subtitles.original: Pengen godain kamu aja. Sini, sini, sini!
subtitles.english: I just want to tease you. Come here, come here!

subtitles.original: Pulang kamu habis ini? Loh, kamu habis ini pulang sama aku kan?
subtitles.english: Are you going home after this? Hey, you're going home with me after this, right?

subtitles.original: Pulang?
subtitles.english: Go home?

subtitles.original: Iya, habis ini nggak ada apa-apa lagi kan?
subtitles.english: Yeah, there's nothing else after this, right?

subtitles.original: Ngapain? Enak-enak aku di atas.
subtitles.english: Why would I? It's nice up there for me.

subtitles.original: Masa kamu mau seret gua?
subtitles.english: Are you really going to drag me down?

subtitles.original: Loh, kita... Loh bukannya kita...
subtitles.english: Wait, we... Aren't we...

subtitles.original: Kita, kita... Kamu aja iblis.
subtitles.english: We, we? You're the only demon here.

subtitles.original: Ajak dong, ajak dong Mbak.
subtitles.english: Take me with you, sis.

subtitles.original: Reine: Kamu, saya ajak? / Kobo: Aku kesepian.
subtitles.english: Reine: I should take you? / Kobo: I'm lonely.

subtitles.original: Ayo, sini, bareng. Fallen angel nih.
subtitles.english: Come on, let's go together. Fallen angel here.

subtitles.original: Ngak, nggak ada fallen angel. Nggak ada fallen angel ya, guys.
subtitles.english: No, there's no fallen angel. No fallen angel, guys.

subtitles.original: Mau saksikan nggak aku panah?
subtitles.english: Want to witness me shooting the arrow?

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, coba, coba, coba. Panah, sore!
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, show me. Shoot, shoot!

subtitles.original: Satu, dua, tiga, puh!
subtitles.english: One, two, three, phew!

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, gila gila gila.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, crazy crazy crazy.

subtitles.original: How to tame your demon.
subtitles.english: How to tame your demon.

subtitles.original: How to tame your demon. Jadi light novel.
subtitles.english: How to tame your demon. It becomes a light novel.
